What we do

Specialist bathroom fitting & plumbing services.

From the first sketch to the final clean-up — every job is handled personally, with a small trusted team where needed.

01
🛁

Bathroom Fitting & Full Refurbishments

Complete strip-out, design and re-build. Tiling, plumbing, electrics and finishing all coordinated by one team.

02
🛒

Bathroom Supply & Fit

Help choosing the right units, tiles and accessories to match your vision — then expertly installed.

03
♿

Disabled Bathrooms & Wet Rooms

Accessible, safe and beautifully finished wet rooms designed around individual needs.

04
🚿

Shower Installation & Shower Rooms

Walk-ins, enclosures and complete shower rooms — including pumps, valves and pressure work.

05
🔧

General Plumbing & Heating

Radiators, taps, leaks, central heating issues — the everyday jobs done properly and tidily.

About M MAC

Meet Michael — your plumber from start to finish.

I'm Michael MacArthur, a fully qualified plumbing and heating engineer with 20 years' experience. M MAC Plumbing & Heating is a one-man business based in Wadhurst, and I specialise in high-quality bathroom refurbishments across East Sussex and Kent.

The promise is simple: a complete service tailored to your vision, delivered without the stress. I'll help you choose units and accessories, handle the plumbing and tiling myself, and bring in a small network of electricians and plasterers I've known and worked with for years for anything outside my trade.

Most of my work comes from word of mouth and recommendations — which is exactly how I like it. You get the same person on day one, day five and the final hand-over.

M
Michael MacArthur
